product_overview: ServicioSTS is a service management platform for registering technical services, tracking task execution, and measuring performance across collaborators, areas, and the overall system. It also provides public service tracking so clients can follow progress and submit ratings without logging in.
core_goals: Register new technical services with client, equipment, and assignment details
Track task execution with time measurement and evidence capture
Allow clients to view service progress publicly and submit ratings
Help collaborators review their individual performance metrics
Help managers and administrators analyze productivity, satisfaction, and system-wide performance

features.name: User Authentication
features.description: Users log in with a username and password and are redirected to the appropriate area based on their role.
user_flows: Navigate to /login -> Enter username -> Enter password -> Submit login form -> See role-based destination page
Navigate to /login -> Enter username -> Enter password -> Submit login form -> See invalid credentials message

features.name: Service Creation
features.description: Authorized users create a new service by entering client, equipment, assignment, and template information, then receive a generated service code.
user_flows: Navigate to /servicios/nuevo -> Search for an existing client or create a new client by name or DNI -> Enter equipment details -> Select the service type -> Select the common fault -> Choose the responsible area and technician -> Select a task template -> Set the estimated time -> Submit the form -> See the generated service code

Navigate to /servicios/nuevo -> Search for a client -> Enter equipment details -> Select the service type -> Select the common fault -> Choose the responsible area and technician -> Select a task template -> Set the estimated time -> Submit the form -> See the new service listed with pending status

features.name: Service Execution with Time Tracking
features.description: Collaborators open a service, track time on each task, add comments, upload evidence, and complete tasks until the service is finished.
user_flows: Navigate to /servicios -> Open an assigned service -> View the task checklist and progress information -> Start tracking time on a task -> Pause or resume tracking as needed -> Complete the task -> Upload evidence for the task -> Add a comment -> Continue with remaining tasks -> See the service progress update

Navigate to /servicios -> Open an assigned service -> View elapsed time compared with the estimate -> Start tracking time on a task -> Complete the task -> Repeat for all tasks -> See the service marked as completed

features.name: Client Ratings
features.description: Clients access a public service page, review the completed work, and submit a star rating with optional feedback.
user_flows: Navigate to /public/servicio/:codigo -> Enter the service code -> View the service status and completion details -> View visible evidence -> Select a rating from 1 to 5 stars -> Write an optional comment or suggestion -> Submit the rating
Navigate to /seguimiento-cliente -> Enter the service code -> View the current service progress -> Review completed tasks and visible evidence -> Submit feedback rating

features.name: Public Service Tracking
features.description: Clients can check the progress of a service without authentication using its public code.
user_flows: Navigate to /seguimiento-cliente -> Enter the service code -> View the current status and progress bar -> View elapsed time compared with the estimate -> Review completed tasks -> View visible evidence
Navigate to /public/servicio/:codigo -> Enter the service code -> View service details -> Add a public comment

features.name: Collaborator Performance
features.description: Collaborators view their own performance metrics, including completed services, efficiency, ratings, tracked time, and productivity over time periods.
user_flows: Navigate to /midesempeno -> View completed services count -> View efficiency percentage -> View average rating received -> View total tracked time -> View completed tasks count -> View productivity by day -> Filter the view by today, week, or month

features.name: Area Manager View
features.description: Area managers review team-level satisfaction, NPS, collaborator ranking, and metric formulas for their area.
user_flows: Navigate to /miarea -> View team satisfaction metrics -> View team NPS -> View collaborator ranking within the area -> Change the date period filter -> View metric formulas in the information panels

features.name: Reports
features.description: Managers and administrators compare productivity by collaborator or by area using summary cards, tables, calculated metrics, and date filters.
user_flows: Navigate to /reportes -> View reports by collaborator -> Review summary cards and metric tables -> Switch to reports by area -> Review the area summary cards and table -> Change the date range filter -> View the updated metrics
Navigate to /reportes -> Switch between collaborator and area views -> Compare efficiency, performance, and productivity metrics -> Open metric information panels

features.name: Dashboard KPIs
features.description: Administrators review global operational KPIs, collaborator rankings, and system metrics from the main dashboard.
user_flows: Navigate to /dashboard -> View services completed today -> View average service time -> View compliance rate -> View overall efficiency -> View NPS and satisfaction metrics -> Review the collaborator ranking
Navigate to /dashboard -> Change the date range -> View updated KPI values -> Open metric information panels for formula details

features.name: System Performance
features.description: Administrators review global service, rating, collaborator, and system breakdowns to understand overall operational performance.
user_flows: Navigate to /admin/rendimiento -> View total services and completion rate -> View global efficiency -> Review the rating distribution -> Review collaborator rankings -> Review system metrics by service type -> Review common fault frequency

features.name: Manager Client Management
features.description: Managers access client management for reviewing and organizing client records.
user_flows: Navigate to /manager/clientes -> View the client list -> Search or review client records -> Open a client record for management

features.name: Manager Performance Overview
features.description: Managers review their area or team performance from a management perspective.
user_flows: Navigate to /manager/desempeno -> View the performance overview -> Review the available productivity and efficiency summaries

features.name: Service Distribution Management
features.description: Managers review how services are distributed across collaborators or areas.
user_flows: Navigate to /manager/distribucion -> View the service distribution overview -> Review how services are allocated across the team or area

features.name: Service List and Filtering
features.description: Authorized users browse services with search and filter controls to find specific records.
user_flows: Navigate to /servicios -> Review the service list -> Filter by criteria -> Search for a service -> Open a matching service record

features.name: Service Detail Review
features.description: Authorized users inspect a specific service in detail, including tasks, tracking, evidence, and comments.
user_flows: Navigate to /servicios -> Open a service record -> Review task progress -> Review tracking information -> Review evidence and comments

routes.description: Login page for all users (admin, encargado, colaborador)
TV display showing service status in waiting room
Public service detail page accessible via unique code
Admin dashboard with KPIs, rankings, system indicators
Area manager view showing team performance and services
Service list with filters and search
Create new service with client data, equipment, and template
Service detail with tasks, tracking, evidence, comments
Productivity reports by collaborator and area
System performance with ratings and global KPIs

features.name: User Authentication
features.description: Login with username and password, role-based redirection
user_interactions: View error message on invalid credentials

features.name: Dashboard KPIs
features.description: Admin dashboard with key performance indicators, rankings, and system metrics
user_interactions: View InfoPopovers on each metric for formula/details

features.name: Service Creation
features.description: Register new service with client info, equipment details, and task template
user_interactions: Search/create client by DNI or name
Select service type and common fault

features.name: Service Execution with Time Tracking
features.description: Collaborators complete tasks with real-time tracking, evidence upload
user_interactions: View service details and task checklist
Start time tracking on a task

features.name: Client Ratings
features.description: Clients rate completed services (1-5) with comments and suggestions
user_interactions: View service status and completion details

features.name: Collaborator Performance
features.description: Individual performance metrics for each technician
user_interactions: View efficiency percentage (estimated vs real time)

features.name: Area Manager View
features.description: Team-level performance overview for area managers

features.name: Reports
features.description: Productivity reports by collaborator and area with calculated metrics
user_interactions: Switch between "por colaborador" and "por área" tabs
View table with efficiency, performance, productivity

features.name: System Performance
features.description: Global system KPIs, rating distribution, and collaborator rankings
user_interactions: View system metrics by service type

features.name: Public Service Tracking
features.description: Clients track their service status publicly without authentication
user_interactions: View current status and progress bar

known_limitations.issue: Backend is deployed separately on Vercel (proxy in vite.config.ts points to https://grupostsgestionservicios.vercel.app)
known_limitations.impact: Local dev requires backend to be running or proxy target to be reachable

known_limitations.issue: Some admin CRUD operations are UI-only with local state
known_limitations.impact: Create/update may not persist without backend implementation
